title: Mission #3 – Feeding Time
subtitle: Favilla Blaze vs. the Highchair Ninja

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Dinner time, home in Nova Tutinia. In the kitchen, a new mission begins.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla, beloved cook and guardian of the hearth, prepares a fragrant pasta worthy of legend.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: This time it's going to go smoothly. Perfect pasta, perfect temperature, perfect timing.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Prrrt!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Ale is in his highchair, ready for combat. He doesn't eat yet. First he sizes up his opponent.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Prrrt! Pprrrt!

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: He's blowing raspberries. Great. We're already in hostile territory.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The Highchair Ninja delivers his first warning: drool, raspberries and psychological chaos.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The pasta is ready. Favilla approaches with the first spoonful — calm, precise, confident.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Honey, open up. Just one spoonful.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: But with the agility of a legendary ninja, Ale bursts into action.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Aaah!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: One after another, the spoonfuls are intercepted. Ale grabs them, deflects them and unleashes a pasta-storm.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Mush on the floor. Mush on the tray. Mush on Ale's face. Mush everywhere except where it's supposed to be.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Bubbà. He's using the Hundred Dodges technique.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Eeeeh!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Seeing the kitchen plunge into chaos, Mallow Bellow steps in, sure he can distract the little warrior.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: I've got this. I'll distract him for a sec.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Fatal mistake. The Highchair Ninja knows neither mercy nor allies.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: In an instant, Mallow too is hit by a barrage of mush right in the face.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The situation is now completely out of control.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla is covered in mush. Ale is covered in mush. Mallow is covered in mush. The kitchen looks like the battlefield of a semolina war.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Fine. If you want a ninja war... then you'll get a ninja war.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Prrrt!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: And here comes Favilla Blaze.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: A golden spark crosses the kitchen. The air vibrates. Time seems to slow down.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Let's see if you can dodge Mom's speed.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Faster than the Highchair Ninja, Favilla Blaze rapid-fires spoonfuls into Ale with superhuman precision, leaving him no time to dodge a single one.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Before you can blink, the meal is over.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Not all of it in Ale's stomach, of course. Some on the bib. Some on the floor. Some on Favilla. Some on Mallow. But the mission can be called complete.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Technical draw. I'll take it.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Final score: Ale 1 - Favilla Blaze 1.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Ahhhh!
